title: PAN-OS create or edit policy
content:
This playbook will automate the process of creating or editing a policy.
The first task in the playbook checks if there is a security policy that matches the playbook inputs. If there is no security policy that matches, a new policy will be created. If there is a security policy that matches, the user will be able to modify the existing policy or create a new hardened policy.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Cortex XSOAR pack (Change_Management, xsoar-supported).

Inputs — Destination; Source; Protocol: The IP protocol number; Action: Action for the rule (allow, deny, drop); Application : A comma-separated list of application object names for the rule to create.; Destination_zone: A comma-separated list of destination zones.; Log_forwarding: Log forwarding profile.; Profile_setting: A profile setting group.; Rulename: Name of the rule to create.; Service: A comma-separated list of service object names for the rule..

Integrations/scripts used: PanoramaSecurityPolicyMatchWrapper, SetGridField, pan-os-create-rule.
